name: Bean Burritos
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare a 11 x 7-inch pan with cooking spray.
3. In a skillet, heat olive oil over moderate heat.
4. Add pepper, onions, and garlic; cook, covered, stirring occasionally, for 5 minutes or until onions are lightly browned.
5. Add 3/4 cup water; cook, uncovered, another 5 minutes or until vegetables are very soft and almost all liquid has evaporated.
6. Add beans, tomato paste, cumin, chili powder, and remaining 1/2 cup water; cook, covered, stirring occasionally, for 5 minutes.
7. Mash the mixture with a potato masher or spoon until smooth.
8. Place 2 tablespoons of bean mixture on each tortilla and sprinkle with 1 tablespoon cheese.
9. Roll up the tortillas and place them, seam side down, in a single layer in the prepared pan.
10. Brush each tortilla with a little water using a pastry brush.
11. Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 15 minutes or until tortillas are piping hot.
